findings.title: Venue Over Capacity
findings.why: The worst-case headcount projection exceeds venue capacity, risking logistical issues on the wedding day.
findings.do: Consider restricting unconfirmed plus-ones or move some invitations to a virtual option.

findings.title: Overdue RSVPs
findings.why: Multiple households have pending or no response statuses beyond the RSVP deadline, affecting headcount accuracy.
findings.do: Chase large overdue households for a quick update on their attendance plans.

findings.title: Ambiguous Plus-Ones
findings.why: Guests with allowed but unnamed plus-ones introduce uncertainty in final numbers.
findings.do: Contact the Friedman and Goldstein households to confirm their plus-one details.
